nasb.text: For by the ascent of Luhith They will ascend with continual weeping; For at the descent of Horonaim They have heard the anguished cry of destruction.

esv.text: For at the ascent of Luhith they go up weeping; for at the descent of Horonaim they have heard the distressed cry of destruction.

cnv.text: 在上魯希的路上， 摩押人隨走隨哭； 從何羅念下來的途中， 聽見他們因城被毀發出悽慘的哀號聲。”

ccb.text: 摩押人痛哭着走上鲁希坡， 他们在何罗念的山坡下听见悲惨的哀号。
